verse_text: Now the first day of the week Mary Magdalene went to the tomb early, while it was still dark, and saw that the stone had been taken away from the tomb.

links.context: Ps 23 is a prophecy of the Resurrection of the Lord Jesus Christ (the first day of the week, v. 1; see also [[MAT.28:1]]; [[MRK.16:2]]; [[LUK.24:1]]; [[JOH.20:1]]). His Resurrection proves (1) He is the Creator of the world, which He owns (vv. 1, 2); (2) He is worthy to ascend on high as the Forerunner of the Church (vv. 3-6; see also Heb 6:19, 20; 7:26; 9:24); (3) He is the King of glory, who destroyed death and Hades (vv. 7- 10; see also [[REV.1:18]]; 4:8-11).

symbolic.title: Returning to the Garden of Eden
